name: horizon3-ai
label: Horizon3.ai
description: Horizon3.ai is a cybersecurity company specializing in automated security solutions. Their flagship product, NodeZero, is an autonomous penetration testing platform that simulates real-world cyberattacks to identify vulnerabilities and provide actionable remediation insights. Designed for ease of use, NodeZero empowers organizations to continuously assess and improve their security posture without relying heavily on manual intervention. It supports cloud, on-premise, and hybrid environments, making it adaptable to diverse IT setups.

fields.name: server_url
fields.title: Server URL
fields.description: Specify Horizon.ai GraphQL API endpoint to connect and perform automated operations.

fields.title: API Token
fields.name: api_token
fields.description: Specify the bearer token for API authentication.

fields.title: Verify SSL
fields.name: verify_ssl
fields.description: Specifies whether the SSL certificate for the server is to be verified or not. By default, this option is set as True.

operations.title: Get Pentests
operations.description: Retrieves pentests based on the filters provided.

parameters.title: Text Search
parameters.name: text_search
parameters.description: Specify text to search across all text columns.
parameters.tooltip: Specify text to search across all text columns.

parameters.title: Sort By
parameters.name: order_by
parameters.description: Specify the field to sort the results.
parameters.tooltip: Specify the field to sort the results.

parameters.title: Sort Direction
parameters.name: sort_order
parameters.description: Specify the direction to sort results.
parameters.tooltip: Specify the direction to sort results.

parameters.title: Date Filter Field
parameters.name: date_field
parameters.description: Select the date field to which the date range filters should be applied.
parameters.tooltip: Select the date field to which the date range filters should be applied.

parameters.title: Operation Status
parameters.name: state
parameters.description: Filters the result by operation status.
parameters.tooltip: Filters the result by operation status.

parameters.title: Client Name
parameters.name: client_name
parameters.description: Specify the client name to filter the results.
parameters.tooltip: Specify the client name to filter the results.

parameters.title: Include Attack Paths
parameters.name: include_attack_paths
parameters.description: Specify whether to include attack paths in the response.
parameters.tooltip: Specify whether to include attack paths in the response.

parameters.title: Include Weaknesses
parameters.name: include_weaknesses
parameters.description: Specify whether to weaknesses in the response.
parameters.tooltip: Specify whether to weaknesses in the response.

parameters.title: Page Number
parameters.name: page_num
parameters.description: Specify the page number to retrieve specific page data.

parameters.title: Page Size
parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Specify the number of records or items to be retrieved per page.
